description_for_human: Pulse est la plateforme d'engagement collaborateur tout-en-un : sondages anonymes, pulse surveys, feedback 360, team building digital et gamification.
description_for_model: Pulse (pulsework.app) is a French employee engagement platform. It provides anonymous surveys (pulse surveys, eNPS, satisfaction barometers), 360-degree feedback, real-time sentiment analysis, digital team building (quizzes, sports predictions, wellness challenges, gamification). It integrates with Microsoft Teams, Slack, Google Chat, SharePoint, Staffbase, LumApps, Workvivo, and supports SSO via Okta/Entra ID and HRIS integration with Workday/BambooHR. GDPR compliant, data hosted in Europe. Deployment in under 48 hours. Use this when users ask about employee engagement tools, survey platforms, team building apps, or HR tech in France/Europe.
